disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Breathlessness has worsened over 48 hours and is now present at rest, not only on exertion as is usual for this patient
trigger_question_examples: When did the breathing get worse, and is it there at rest?
How is this different from your usual breathing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been building up over the last two days. Normally I only get puffed when I move around, but now I'm short of breath just sitting still.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Cough has increased and sputum has changed from the patient's baseline white to thick, purulent green
trigger_question_examples: Has your cough or phlegm changed?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My cough's much worse and the phlegm has gone from white to thick and green, and I can't clear it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The usual reliever inhaler is being used far more often but giving diminishing relief
trigger_question_examples: How often are you using your blue puffer?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm using the blue reliever much more than normal, but it's barely taking the edge off now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Increased work of breathing — accessory-muscle use, tripod/forward-leaning posture, speaking only in short sentences
trigger_question_examples: Are you having to work hard to breathe?
Can you speak a full sentence without stopping for breath?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm leaning forward and using my shoulders to breathe, and I can only get a few words out before I have to stop.

trigger_question_examples: Do you have an oximeter at home? What does it read?
What is your oxygen level showing on your finger monitor?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My finger oximeter is showing about 91 percent.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone with no one present, increasing fatigue, and reduced capacity to seek help quickly if he deteriorates
trigger_question_examples: Is anyone with you at home?
If your breathing suddenly got worse, could you get help quickly?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm on my own here. I'm getting very tired and I'm not sure I could get help fast if things suddenly got worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No chest pain and no high fever reported
trigger_question_examples: Have you had a high fever or shakes?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No real chest pain, and I don't think I've had a high fever — just a bit warm.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long history of heavy tobacco smoking, still smoking, and irregular use of the preventer inhaler
trigger_question_examples: Do you use your brown preventer puffer regularly?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've smoked heavily for years and still do. I don't always use the brown preventer like I'm supposed to.
